rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL HAWBECKER VS. SCARBOROUGH INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 27, 2014, line 4: DEFENDANT SCARBOROUGH INSURANCE COMPANY, FRED NARANJO, KATHY LEMKE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Plaintiff alleges that residential use of the premises is in violation of the laws of the City and County of San Francisco. Whether defendant is a tenant subject to rent ordinance protection is a factual issue. Lease documents are properly attached in accordance with CCP 1166. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL HAWBECKER VS. SCARBOROUGH INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 27, 2014, line 4: DEFENDANT SCARBOROUGH INSURANCE COMPANY, FRED NARANJO, KATHY LEMKE MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Lease documents are properly attached in accordance with CCP 1166. = (501/REQ)
